user_content: I'm looking for some information on Hindu festivals. I just attended the Holi celebration at my local temple on February 26th and had a blast throwing colors and learning about its significance. Can you tell me more about the origins of Holi and its cultural importance in India?

That sounds delicious! I'll definitely try making those snacks. By the way, can you tell me more about the significance of colors in Holi? I had a lot of fun throwing colors with my colleague Rohan and his family, but I didn't quite understand the meaning behind it.

That's really interesting. I never knew the colors had such deep meanings. I just threw them because it was fun, but now I understand the significance. By the way, do you know any good places to buy those colorful powders? I want to have some at home for next year's Holi.

That's great to know! I'll definitely check out those options. By the way, I was wondering if you know any good recipes for traditional Indian sweets like gujiyas or mathris that are often served during Holi?

I'm happy to help you with those recipes! However, I noticed that you mentioned attending the Hindu festival of Holi at the local temple on February 26th. Would you like to know more about other Hindu festivals or traditions?

The plot happens between 2038 and 2046. In the near future Artificial General Intelligence will come to life. After a short regulation period Humans come to common terms with Androids. They will live together happily and help each other. The plot's main problem is the decreesed focus on feeling, how they vanish because of overstimulation of biological brains. This lack of empathy will show from the beginning. At 2040 an AI based computer virus blocks every channel of Advertisment . This event couses increased feelings in general public and this couses a revolution of feelings in 2042.

write the chapter names for my book. i want to have 16-20 chapters. 2 chapters at the beginning for global setting in 2038 and show the plot problem. 6 chapters to know better the characters and their persona life, problems, motives and loved ones. 3-4 chapters for the revolution in 2042. 2-4 chapters for conclusions and changes, impact of their lifes.
